subcodes.first_line: O thou who art the object of the loving-kindness of the Most Great Unity! Kindle thou a light whose radiance shall extend from the lowest realm unto the Kingdom of Abhá [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ملحوظ نظر عنایت حضرت احدیت شمعی برافروز که پرتوش از ملا ادنی تا ملکوت ابهی
subcodes.subjects: @power of faith; power of the spirit, @transcending the material condition, @call to action, @spiritual transformation, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
